evidence.text: an end-to-end walkthrough using Microsoft Foundry Portal, SDK and Skills # Workshop: "Observe, Optimize & Protect Your AI Agents In Microsoft Foundry" ## Session Description **Duration:** 75 minutes Want to build trustworthy AI agents? The hard part lies NOT in making them work the first time, but in **keeping them working continuously** over the lifetime of the application - even as models get updated, prompts get refined, retrieval pipelines drift, and real-world use uncovers edge cases. To do this, we need a unified platform that provides end-to-end observability - with rich developer tools that take us seaml
